title: アヤベさんのサンドウィッチ

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Today, Admire Vega and I are shopping for
ingredients to make sandwiches.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She's apparently preparing a lunchbox for
tomorrow. I didn't hear this from her, however...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Haaah ha ha ha! I appear a fourth time!

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text: Huh, Opera O! Today too?!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: ...This is the fifth time. Not the fourth.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: And many more times to come, Ayabe! That is...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Until you come to the Centurial Overlord's Truly
Delightful Lunch Exchange!

text_block_list.name: Ayabe's Classmate A
text_block_list.text:
Ahaha! Opera O is so cute. She loves Ayabe just
like the rest of us!

text_block_list.name: Ayabe's Classmate B
text_block_list.text:
Will she show up tomorrow? If this starts being a
regular thing, lunchtime will become my highlight
of the day!

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text:
Um... Doto and I would love for you to come,
Ayabe! Of course, it's up to you, though.

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text:
But trying it once won't hurt, right? It's really fun
trading lunch with everyone!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: ...And so, she apparently gave in.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
A homemade lunch trade... I'm not even that good at
cooking to begin with.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: I can only really make sandwiches.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Sigh...

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
I'd like to get your opinion on what I should
make... if you don't mind.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
Since someone else will be eating it, it's probably
better to get someone else's opinion rather than
go with my own preferences.
choice_data_list: Of course, I'm happy to help.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I take a look around thinking of how wholesome it
is that Admire Vega's taking this seriously.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Something general and safe shouldn't be too
difficult to find. She's only making a sandwich...

text_block_list.name: Shopkeeper
text_block_list.text:
Welcome, welcome! We have plenty of rare
delicacies you can't find anywhere else!

text_block_list.name: Shopkeeper
text_block_list.text:
In the right hands, they're sure to add an element
of surprise to your everyday cooking! Take your
cooking to the next level!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Handled correctly, these ingredients could make
for a supreme sandwich. But it's kind of risky,
some of this stuff looks like it requires special
treatment.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: So, what should I choose?
choice_data_list: Let's go with the exotic meat!
Let's go with the rare fish!
Let's go with the heirloom vegetables!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm sure her classmates will be happy even if we
go with safe ingredients. I suggest some typical
options.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Well, if it ain't Ayabe! I was wonderin' who'd be
out here wearin' their uniform!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Tamamo... Hello.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Back at ya! So, are you two shoppin' today?
choice_data_list: We're looking to make a sandwich.
We're looking to make a sandwich.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Oooh, sandwiches! Not one for traditional
lunchboxes, huh?

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Now that ya mention it, I think I saw Creek makin'
star-shaped sandwiches the other day. You
plannin' to do somethin' like that too, Ayabe?

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Huh? No. I... do have a cutter, but...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Ahaha! But ya barely use it, right? Well, when ya
do use, whatever does come out pretty cute.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
I sometimes do that for the li'l squirts back home.
They always get so happy too!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: And I like that I can snack on the cut-off bits! Hahaha!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
...I imagine some of the younger students would
enjoy sharing the sliced-off ends.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Yeah... I definitely get it, but I don't know...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Hearing Tamamo Cross talk admiringly of her
younger siblings, Admire Vega's expression
softens a little.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Let's try a challenge! I suggest going with the
meat.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Oh, hey, Ayabe! Are you lookin' for high-quality
meat?

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: No, not exactly...
choice_data_list: Are you looking for high-quality meat, Hishiama?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Yeah! I'm gettin' some for Brian's lunch.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
She's always eatin' by that guide "Overcome Your
Hate for Vegetables!" It's gotta be tough, right?
You should treat yourself every once in a while!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
So, I thought I'd make somethin' super gourmet
for meat lovers.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
And actually, we're competin' over who can make
the best lunch, one-on-one! I swear I'll win, or my
name's not Hishiama!
choice_data_list:
It's nice to make something with another person
in mind.

It's nice to make something with another person
in mind.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
It's essential when you're plannin' on givin' it to
'em!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Thanks... I'll have to keep that in mind.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Hm? Haha, well, if I helped, I helped!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I wonder if Admire Vega will keep someone in
mind while making the sandwich.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Before we know it, the lunch trade gets underway,
and...

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text:
Oh, wow! Ayabe, did you really make this?! It
tastes amazing!

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text:
Mmm! It's so good! Like really, really, really good!
Ahhh! It's just so good!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: That vocabulary... Aren't you an honor student?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: ...It's a huge success!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: She ate it all. She even said it was good.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Yeah...

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Thanks for helping me.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: That went pretty well!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: I... decided not to join.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
The sandwich wasn't good enough to give to
someone else...
choice_data_list: It's my fault for giving bad advice!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
No, it's not your fault. It was my decision in the
end.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: It just comes down to... my lack of skill.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: That was disappointing...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Let's try a challenge! I suggest going with the fish.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Oh! I thought I'd seen that celestial visage before!
Adve— mean, Ayabe!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Hi... I have to go.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Immediately after respectfully returning the
greeting, Admire Vega tries to leave with
shockingly cool composure!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Hey, hey, hey! Where ya going?! At least listen to
my next two lines!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
I came here to buy groceries. I don't have time to
mess around with you.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: As if I've spent all 365 days of the year goofing off 24-7 for the last 4.6 billion years! Which I have, mind you!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
See? If you're going to be like that, this
conversation's over.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Whoa, wait wait wait! At least tell me about the
two types of comet tails! Come oooon!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
...The ion tail is composed of gases, and the dust
tail is self-explanatory. Okay, bye.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Wait, last one! I swear! What's the constellation
that holds the star from which Mira variable
pulsating stars got their name?!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Cetus. Are we done now?

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Wh-what about the group of asteroids that share
an orbit with Jup—

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: The Trojan asteroids. Enough already!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
This probably doesn't sound like much coming
from someone who kept breaking her promise,
but the fact that you keep answering really
speaks to your character.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Perhaps as a token of her appreciation, Gold Ship
helps us select ingredients with her vast
knowledge of seafood.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Before we know it, the lunch trade gets underway,
and...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Ahh! What incredible flavor! What richness in
tastes! This is the type of supreme sandwich the
Overlord deseeeerves! ♪

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Wagner, Rossini, Verdi, and even Mozart would
all rush to compose songs of praise after just one
bite!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: ...Thanks. But don't talk when you eat.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: ...It's a huge success!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: She ate it all. She even said it was good.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Yeah...

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Thanks for helping me.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: That went pretty well!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: I... decided not to join.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
The sandwich wasn't good enough to give to
someone else...
choice_data_list: It's my fault for giving bad advice!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
No, it's not your fault. It was my decision in the
end.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: It just comes down to... my lack of skill.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: That was disappointing...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Let's try a challenge! I suggest going with the
vegetables.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Oh...

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: ...Hello, Taishin.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Hi...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Um, are you shopping?

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Yeah. And you?

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Well... everyone's been making a fuss about
nutrition or whatever.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: You know what? Never mind.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Sure.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Actually... You were at class today, r—

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: I mean... Nah, forget it.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
...But actually, though, over there I saw some
stuff that looks pretty easy to use.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Really? Thanks.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Neither of them says it out loud, but it seems like
their sentiment toward their peers is oddly similar.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Before we know it, the lunch trade gets underway,
and...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Ohhh, w-wowie, it's so good! Y-you're so
talented, Ayabe!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
I'll eat carefully and savor every bite! I won't drop
even a crumb!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: That's a bit over the top.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: ...It's a huge success!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: She ate it all. She even said it was good.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Yeah...

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Thanks for helping me.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: That went pretty well!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: I... decided not to join.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
The sandwich wasn't good enough to give to
someone else...
choice_data_list: It's my fault for giving bad advice!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
No, it's not your fault. It was my decision in the
end.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: It just comes down to... my lack of skill.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: That was disappointing...
